title: Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)

'''''Wanted by Cracken''''' is a paperback supplement to ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' published by [[West End Games]]. It was written by [[Louis J. Prosperi]] and published in [[June]] [[1993]]. ''Wanted by Cracken'' was also the title of a [[Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)|series of articles]] featured in several issues of ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''.

The book and article series were presented as an in-universe report (also known as "[[Wanted by Cracken]]") from [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] to [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] operatives, around [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]].<ref name="WC Dates">''Wanted by Cracken'' is set three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which the ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], meaning ''Wanted by Cracken'' is set in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]].</ref> It highlighted fifty individuals wanted by Cracken for various crimes. The wanted individuals included [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]], [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]], [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] and rogue [[Droid/Legends|droids]].

==Publisher's summary==
'''Wanted For Crimes Against The New Republic'''

''Some of the most despicable criminals in the galaxy are on the loose, and it is up to the soldiers of the New Republic to bring them in and pick up the reward. Inside this book are Imperial military officers, bounty hunters, smugglers, assassins and many other criminals who represent a threat to the New Republic: over 50 individuals in all!''

''Each entry includes game statistics, a personal history of the criminal, the amount of the reward offered by the New Republic and an illustration. Many entries contain additional information on henchmen, specialized equipment and hidden bases, as well as adventure hooks and hints on using the criminal in your ''Star Wars'' adventures.''
